message:
fix: send X-Requested-With on all /api requests (#8830) (#8832)

PR #8738 landed `csrfGuard` on the entire `/api` Fiber group in server.go,
so every POST/PUT/DELETE/PATCH to /api/* is rejected unless the request
carries `X-Requested-With: XMLHttpRequest`. The /auth/refresh inline fetch
was updated in #6588, but the shared `api.post/put/delete` helpers and
`authFetch` were not — they only set Content-Type and Authorization. That
is why submitting a bug report via Feedback → Contribute (POST
/api/feedback/requests) returns "CSRF header required" on local dev
where the Go backend, not Netlify Functions, serves the API.

Adds the header to the ApiClient's `getHeaders()` and to `authFetch`, so
every caller picks it up transparently. Safe on GET/HEAD because the
middleware's safeHTTPMethods set passes those through unconditionally.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
